What's up? What's up Ninja Fitness Academy Ninja Fam? So we're making this video today to announce a big change. You might have heard going around the gym. We are moving into a life coaching model and so the the I'll start with the small bad news first is that effective June 17th we are going to be getting rid of our group class group class schedule entirely. We are going to be moving into a different model and that model is a life coach facility which we feel is where we're better suited to make changes anyway. But I want to give you guys the story of what what got us this point. So when we first opened this facility over about a year and three months ago we did it with the intention of helping as many people with their lives as possible and the reality is is that minority of people have actually achieved the result that we set out to get for them. And a majority have experienced short-term success and then after that they dropped off they no longer continued to progress they no longer continued to make the the progress that we had promised them from the get-go. And we just we would sit there and rack our brains about what was the biggest issue and what was causing this this failure for on our part if we wanted to see is we wanted to see a majority 90% of our clientele 95 100 if possible getting the results they signed up for us with because that's what you guys came here for you guys came here initially because you wanted us to help you get a result and in turn and in turn you know you kind of found a home within the group classes. But what we have found is that a lot of the clients we work with we're spending three to four hours a week trying to offset the bad decisions they made the other 95 hours in the week we're spending those three to four hours trying to offset those bad decisions as much as possible and we just found that it wasn't really working. And so that's when we launched our our hybrid program where we were able to put much more resources into coaching our clients and you might have seen some of them coming in the gym and you're like who's that you never see them work out and those are actually our hybrid clients that we've been doing life coaching with which is where we're doing everything from workout planning with them to nutrition planning to really in-depth nutrition planning to lifestyle choices to stress levels motivation all these different factors and we have to admit that the results we've got for them is substantially better on a wide scale basis so we're really excited about making this change for our facility all of our you guys are our OG members and we're very appreciative of that we want you to know that if you know you're gonna have the opportunity to sit down with myself or even one of the coaches and we're gonna go in-depth on on why this makes sense for you and why it's gonna make sense for everybody we're not raising your prices we're gonna do anything like that we're gonna give you guys the life coaching our outside clientele pays about $400 a month for this coaching but for you guys we're just gonna give it to you at the rate that you have now we don't want to break on that promise we you signed up to get a result and we want to give you that result and we found that this is the best way for us to do it is by being that life coach for you so we really want to thank you for your patience your time with us on this please meet with us we're looking forward to explaining more about it this is just a general gist like I said June 17th will be the official switch over date and we'll talk to you guys in person about it more and more so I'm gonna I'm gonna give the floor to the team to tell you guys what they're most excited about this change for and yeah so you have the structure and the knowledge that we want to pass on to them awesome so I'm just excited for the fact that like we want to be able to give you guys like sustainable life change so it's like not dependent on the fact that you walk in these doors like you can take us with you anywhere that you go and be able to you know create that result and make something real so that you guys are like healthy when you're 80 not when you're healthy for six weeks and that's really the change that we set out to do so this program's gonna allow us to give you the one-on-one attention that you really need to get this result the most thing I'm excited about you know I don't have to go too in depth on this because y'all already know me and you already know my heart you know Sam so I want the efforts that I put and the time that I put into y'all into whatever human being that I meet I wanted to have a long long-lasting you know saying like the best example I can give you is my son he feel me like I'm proud myself for being a good father and there's gonna come a time where my son's not gonna always have that I've let him in the right direction and I've been a good leader to him I've been a good father to him and that's what that's the same thing that I want for y'all and I mean you already know that more and I cannot be more excited to get a little bit more personal and we'll make this thing work for you for real all right awesome so thanks team see as you guys can see everyone's super excited
